Data.Name: Mara Venn
Data.Description: Mara Venn is fresh out of Aegis Continuity’s accelerated response academy, where she learned battlefield triage, corporate etiquette, and the fine art of deciding who is worth saving under fire. This is her first premium-client field claim without a senior agent directly supervising her.
